ayahs.arabic: حمٓ
ayahs.translation: Ha, Meem
ayahs.transliteration: Hameem

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلۡكِتَٰبِ ٱلۡمُبِينِ
ayahs.translation: By the clear Book
ayahs.transliteration: Waalkitabi almubeeni

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ فِي لَيۡلَةٖ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind]
ayahs.transliteration: Inna anzalnahu fee laylatin mubarakatin inna kunna munthireena

ayahs.arabic: فِيهَا يُفۡرَقُ كُلُّ أَمۡرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: On that night is made distinct every precise matter
ayahs.transliteration: Feeha yufraqu kullu amrin hakeemin

ayahs.arabic: أَمۡرٗا مِّنۡ عِندِنَآۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرۡسِلِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]
ayahs.transliteration: Amran min AAindina inna kunna mursileena

ayahs.arabic: رَحۡمَةٗ مِّن رَّبِّكَۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
ayahs.translation: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing
ayahs.transliteration: Rahmatan min rabbika innahu huwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena

ayahs.arabic: لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحۡيِۦ وَيُمِيتُۖ رَبُّكُمۡ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.translation: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers
ayahs.transliteration: La ilaha illa huwa yuhyee wayumeetu rabbukum warabbu abaikumu alawwaleena

ayahs.arabic: بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ يَلۡعَبُونَ
ayahs.translation: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves
ayahs.transliteration: Bal hum fee shakkin yalAAaboona

ayahs.arabic: فَٱرۡتَقِبۡ يَوۡمَ تَأۡتِي ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٖ مُّبِينٖ
ayahs.translation: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke
ayahs.transliteration: Fairtaqib yawma tatee alssamao bidukhanin mubeenin

ayahs.arabic: يَغۡشَى ٱلنَّاسَۖ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
ayahs.translation: Covering the people; this is a painful torment
ayahs.transliteration: Yaghsha alnnasa hatha AAathabun aleemun

ayahs.arabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكۡشِفۡ عَنَّا ٱلۡعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤۡمِنُونَ
ayahs.translation: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbana ikshif AAanna alAAathaba inna muminoona

ayahs.arabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ وَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ رَسُولٞ مُّبِينٞ
ayahs.translation: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger
ayahs.transliteration: Anna lahumu alththikra waqad jaahum rasoolun mubeenun

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوۡاْ عَنۡهُ وَقَالُواْ مُعَلَّمٞ مَّجۡنُونٌ
ayahs.translation: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma tawallaw AAanhu waqaloo muAAallamun majnoonun

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابِ قَلِيلًاۚ إِنَّكُمۡ عَآئِدُونَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief]
ayahs.transliteration: Inna kashifoo alAAathabi qaleelan innakum AAaidoona

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَبۡطِشُ ٱلۡبَطۡشَةَ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma nabtishu albatshata alkubra inna muntaqimoona

ayahs.arabic: ۞وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَجَآءَهُمۡ رَسُولٞ كَرِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad fatanna qablahum qawma firAAawna wajaahum rasoolun kareemun

ayahs.arabic: أَنۡ أَدُّوٓاْ إِلَيَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
ayahs.translation: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
ayahs.transliteration: An addoo ilayya AAibada Allahi innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

ayahs.arabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعۡلُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّيٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٖ
ayahs.translation: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority
ayahs.transliteration: Waan la taAAloo AAala Allahi innee ateekum bisultanin mubeenin

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّي عُذۡتُ بِرَبِّي وَرَبِّكُمۡ أَن تَرۡجُمُونِ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnee AAuthtu birabbee warabbikum an tarjumooni

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُواْ لِي فَٱعۡتَزِلُونِ
ayahs.translation: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone
ayahs.transliteration: Wain lam tuminoo lee faiAAtazilooni

ayahs.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوۡمٞ مُّجۡرِمُونَ
ayahs.translation: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people
ayahs.transliteration: FadaAAa rabbahu anna haolai qawmun mujrimoona

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِي لَيۡلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued
ayahs.transliteration: Faasri biAAibadee laylan innakum muttabaAAoona

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتۡرُكِ ٱلۡبَحۡرَ رَهۡوًاۖ إِنَّهُمۡ جُندٞ مُّغۡرَقُونَ
ayahs.translation: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned
ayahs.transliteration: Waotruki albahra rahwan innahum jundun mughraqoona

ayahs.arabic: كَمۡ تَرَكُواْ مِن جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٖ
ayahs.translation: How much they left behind of gardens and springs
ayahs.transliteration: Kam tarakoo min jannatin waAAuyoonin

ayahs.arabic: وَزُرُوعٖ وَمَقَامٖ كَرِيمٖ
ayahs.translation: And crops and noble sites
ayahs.transliteration: WazurooAAin wamaqamin kareemin

ayahs.arabic: وَنَعۡمَةٖ كَانُواْ فِيهَا فَٰكِهِينَ
ayahs.translation: And comfort wherein they were amused
ayahs.transliteration: WanaAAmatin kanoo feeha fakiheena

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَۖ وَأَوۡرَثۡنَٰهَا قَوۡمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika waawrathnaha qawman akhareena

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا بَكَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنظَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved
ayahs.transliteration: Fama bakat AAalayhimu alssamao waalardu wama kanoo munthareena

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَجَّيۡنَا بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡمُهِينِ
ayahs.translation: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad najjayna banee israeela mina alAAathabi almuheeni

ayahs.arabic: مِن فِرۡعَوۡنَۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
ayahs.translation: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors
ayahs.transliteration: Min firAAawna innahu kana AAaliyan mina almusrifeena

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخۡتَرۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ عِلۡمٍ عَلَى ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqadi ikhtarnahum AAala AAilmin AAala alAAalameena

ayahs.arabic: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٞاْ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.translation: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial
ayahs.transliteration: Waataynahum mina alayati ma feehi balaon mubeenun

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying
ayahs.transliteration: Inna haolai layaqooloona

ayahs.arabic: إِنۡ هِيَ إِلَّا مَوۡتَتُنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected
ayahs.transliteration: In hiya illa mawtatuna aloola wama nahnu bimunshareena

ayahs.arabic: فَأۡتُواْ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful
ayahs.transliteration: Fatoo biabaina in kuntum sadiqeena

ayahs.arabic: أَهُمۡ خَيۡرٌ أَمۡ قَوۡمُ تُبَّعٖ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ مُجۡرِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Are they better or the people of Tubba' and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals
ayahs.transliteration: Ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaAAin waallatheena min qablihim ahlaknahum innahum kanoo mujrimeena

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا لَٰعِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena

ayahs.arabic: مَا خَلَقۡنَٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
ayahs.translation: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know
ayahs.transliteration: Ma khalaqnahuma illa bialhaqqi walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ مِيقَٰتُهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all
ayahs.transliteration: Inna yawma alfasli meeqatuhum ajmaAAeena

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي مَوۡلًى عَن مَّوۡلٗى شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma la yughnee mawlan AAan mawlan shayan wala hum yunsaroona

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.translation: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man rahima Allahu innahu huwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the tree of zaqqum
ayahs.transliteration: Inna shajarata alzzaqqoomi

ayahs.arabic: طَعَامُ ٱلۡأَثِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Is food for the sinful
ayahs.transliteration: TaAAamu alatheemi

ayahs.arabic: كَٱلۡمُهۡلِ يَغۡلِي فِي ٱلۡبُطُونِ
ayahs.translation: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies
ayahs.transliteration: Kaalmuhli yaghlee fee albutooni

ayahs.arabic: كَغَلۡيِ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Like the boiling of scalding water
ayahs.transliteration: Kaghalyi alhameemi

ayahs.arabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعۡتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire
ayahs.transliteration: Khuthoohu faiAAtiloohu ila sawai aljaheemi

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّواْ فَوۡقَ رَأۡسِهِۦ مِنۡ عَذَابِ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma subboo fawqa rasihi min AAathabi alhameemi

ayahs.arabic: ذُقۡ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡكَرِيمُ
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble
ayahs.transliteration: Thuq innaka anta alAAazeezu alkareemu

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمۡتَرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute
ayahs.transliteration: Inna hatha ma kuntum bihi tamtaroona

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي مَقَامٍ أَمِينٖ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place
ayahs.transliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee maqamin ameenin

ayahs.arabic: فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٖ
ayahs.translation: Within gardens and springs
ayahs.transliteration: Fee jannatin waAAuyoonin

ayahs.arabic: يَلۡبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٖ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقٖ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
ayahs.translation: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other
ayahs.transliteration: Yalbasoona min sundusin waistabraqin mutaqabileena

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجۡنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٖ
ayahs.translation: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika wazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeenin

ayahs.arabic: يَدۡعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure
ayahs.transliteration: YadAAoona feeha bikulli fakihatin amineena

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلۡمَوۡتَ إِلَّا ٱلۡمَوۡتَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
ayahs.transliteration: La yathooqoona feeha almawta illa almawtata aloola wawaqahum AAathaba aljaheemi

ayahs.arabic: فَضۡلٗا مِّن رَّبِّكَۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
ayahs.translation: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment
ayahs.transliteration: Fadlan min rabbika thalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, We have eased the Qur'an in your tongue that they might be reminded
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika laAAallahum yatathakkaroona

ayahs.arabic: فَٱرۡتَقِبۡ إِنَّهُم مُّرۡتَقِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end]
ayahs.transliteration: Fairtaqib innahum murtaqiboona
